prompt_text: PostHog vs Amplitude pricing and features
response:
# PostHog vs Amplitude: Pricing & Features

## **Pricing Model**

### PostHog
- **Free tier**: 1M events/month
- **Pay-as-you-go**: $0.00045/event (after free tier)
- **Self-hosted**: Free (open-source)
- **No minimum commitment** required
- Generally **50-70% cheaper** at scale

### Amplitude
- **Free tier**: 10M events/month (limited features)
- **Paid plans**: Custom pricing (not publicly listed)
- **Minimum commitment**: Often required for enterprise
- **Feature-gated pricing**: Many features locked behind higher tiers
- Generally **more expensive** at scale

---

## **Key Features Comparison**

| Feature | PostHog | Amplitude |
|---------|---------|-----------|
| **Product Analytics** | ✅ Full | ✅ Full |
| **Session Recording** | ✅ Yes | ❌ No (needs Hotjar) |
| **Feature Flags** | ✅ Yes | ❌ No (add-on required) |
| **A/B Testing** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **User Cohorts** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **Funnels & Retention** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **SQL Access** | ✅ Yes | ❌ Partial |
| **Open Source** | ✅ Yes | ❌ No |
| **Self-hosted Option** | ✅ Yes | ❌ Cloud only |
| **Privacy-first** | ✅ Yes | ⚠️ Cloud-dependent |

---

## **When to Choose Each**

### **Choose PostHog if:**
- You need **integrated session recording + analytics**
- You want **feature flags & experimentation** in one platform
- **Cost matters** at scale
- You prefer **self-hosted or privacy-focused** deployment
- You need **SQL-level data access**

### **Choose Amplitude if:**
- You need **enterprise support** and SLA guarantees
- Your team is already invested in their ecosystem
- You want a **specialized analytics platform** (more mature UI)
- You don't need session recording (can integrate Hotjar separately)

---

## **Bottom Line**

**PostHog** = Better all-in-one platform, cheaper, more flexible  
**Amplitude** = More specialized, enterprise-focused, higher cost

**Most teams save money and get more features with PostHog**, especially if they need multiple tools.
